title: conyza andringitrana
intro: Conyza andringitrana, also known as Andringitra conyza or Madagascan fleabane, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. Conyza andringitrana has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Conyza andringitrana typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
